mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, metric_type, metric_value, unit, record_date, created_at, updated_at FROM body_metric_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND metric_type = #{metricType} ORDER BY record_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id, r.user_id, r.metric_type, r.metric_value, r.unit, r.record_date, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM body_metric_record r INNER JOIN ( SELECT metric_type, MAX(id) AS max_id FROM body_metric_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_date = #{date} GROUP BY metric_type ) daily ON daily.max_id = r.id ORDER BY r.metric_type ASC, r.id DESC

SELECT r.id, r.user_id, r.metric_type, r.metric_value, r.unit, r.record_date, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM body_metric_record r INNER JOIN ( SELECT record_date, MAX(id) AS max_id FROM body_metric_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND metric_type = #{metricType} AND record_date >= #{startDate} AND record_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY record_date ) daily ON daily.max_id = r.id ORDER BY r.record_date ASC, r.id ASC
SELECT id, user_id, metric_type, metric_value, unit, record_date, created_at, updated_at FROM body_metric_record WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
